mappings.rationale: Directly relevant to the identification and distribution of mineral resources, and the mining of metal ores, stone, and other minerals.
Covers the geological basis for quarrying and extraction of stone, sand, clay, and gravel described in the section.
Relevant to the identification and distribution of natural resources including coal, petroleum, and mineral deposits.
Covers the properties and processing of industrial materials including metals, ceramics, glass, and plastics.
Relevant to the extraction and processing of individual metallic elements (aluminum, copper, gold, iron, etc.) listed in the section.
Relevant to the chemical processing involved in petroleum refining and the production of synthetic materials.
Covers the chemical principles underlying petroleum refining, coal utilization, and metal ore processing.
Relevant to petroleum refining and the production of chemicals from coal tar and oil.
Provides the chemical foundation for the primary conversion of raw materials including smelting, refining, and chemical processing.
Directly relevant to the conservation of natural resources and the management of the world's physical and biological resources.
Relevant to the management and conservation of natural resources from an economic perspective.
Relevant to the ethical dimensions of resource conservation and the management of natural resources.
Relevant to the environmental consequences of fossil fuel extraction (coal, natural gas, oil) and resource conservation.
Relevant to the processing of plant products for roundwood, sawn wood, veneer, and other forest products.
Relevant to the production of synthetic gemstones and industrial crystals and the manufacture of ceramics.
Covers the historical development of extraction industries including coal mining, iron production, and petroleum.
Relevant to the processing of water to obtain salt, magnesium, oxygen, hydrogen, and other elements.
Relevant to the conservation of biological resources and salvage operations for the world's natural resources.
